name: uxie-ghl-factory
description: GoHighLevel toolkit skills: workflow export/creation, funnel & page building, memberships/course building, account audits, and GHL domain expertise. The GHL MCP server is configured separately (see README).

interface.longDescription: Skills that turn Codex into a competent GoHighLevel operator — design and build workflows, funnels, pipelines, and AI agents, run read-only account audits, and reverse-engineer GHL's internal APIs. Most skills call the GoHighLevel MCP server, which you configure separately in ~/.codex/config.toml (see the plugin README).
defaultPrompt: Use uxie-ghl-factory to design a GoHighLevel workflow.
Use uxie-ghl-factory to audit my GHL sub-account.
Use uxie-ghl-factory to export a GHL workflow's JSON.
